description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical vessel with a slightly tapered profile, featuring smooth, continuous sides and a wide open top. The exterior is a muted teal color, while the interior appears to be hollow, suggesting it is designed to hold or contain materials. The surface is uniform and lacks any visible handles, banding, or reinforcement, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. There are no visible markings, labels, or decorative elements on the exterior. The object is constructed from a hard, likely plastic or metal material, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. Its size and shape suggest it could function as a utility bucket or barrel for general urban use, such as waste collection or material storage.
description: A tall, smooth, teal cylindrical vessel with a wide open top and minimalist design, likely made of plastic or metal.
description_view_0: The object is seen from above, showing the wide open top and the teal exterior surface.
description_view_1: A side perspective reveals the cylindrical shape, smooth sides, and the open top, with no visible handles or reinforcements.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the full height and open mouth of the vessel, emphasizing its capacity and clean design.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, similar to view 1, confirming the absence of handles and the uniformity of the surface.
